case_title: POTRERO MEDIA CORPORATION VS. ROBERT GOFF et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-12-2008 CONTINUED TO JAN-23-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
